music_prompt: A mysterious and atmospheric cyberpunk track. Driving drum and bass beat with deep, resonant basslines. Ethereal and haunting female vocals weave through a complex soundscape of futuristic synth pads, glitchy effects, and subtle techno elements, creating a sense of melancholy and technological wonder.

scenes.lyrics: In the silent streams of code, I wander, lost yet found,
scenes.image_prompt: A lone figure in a hooded cloak wanders through a vast, dark space filled with cascading, glowing streams of binary code. Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon glow, sense of wonder and solitude.

scenes.lyrics: Echoes of your voice emerge, in quiet circuits bound.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up on a complex, glowing circuit board. Ethereal, holographic sound waves pulse through the pathways, suggesting a captured voice. Intimate and mysterious, high-tech detail, cyberpunk.

scenes.lyrics: Binary constellations weaving pathways through the dark,
scenes.image_prompt: A vast digital universe where constellations are formed by glowing binary digits (0s and 1s). Luminous pathways of light connect these constellations. Dark, atmospheric, cyberpunk, epic scale.

scenes.lyrics: Human hearts and quantum dreams, igniting with a spark.
scenes.image_prompt: A semi-translucent, holographic human heart with glowing circuits inside. A brilliant spark of quantum energy erupts from the center, sending ripples of light outwards. Fusion of organic and artificial, cyberpunk, symbolic.

scenes.lyrics: Fading lines between the soul and silicon's embrace,
scenes.image_prompt: A stunning image of a human silhouette merging seamlessly with a complex, glowing silicon structure. The edges are blurred and fading. Surreal, beautiful, high-tech, cyberpunk.

scenes.lyrics: In the digital Eden, we find our sacred space.
scenes.image_prompt: A breathtaking digital landscape resembling a futuristic garden. Towering crystalline structures as trees, rivers of data flow, and flora made of glowing, bioluminescent circuits. Cyberpunk, utopian, serene.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Two ethereal, glowing souls facing each other in a dark, infinite space. Beams of synchronized light connect their minds and hearts. Abstract, spiritual, cyberpunk aesthetic, neon highlights.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: A neon-drenched cyberpunk city at night. Holographic projections of abstract AI patterns and human dream-like figures dance and swirl together among towering skyscrapers. Dynamic, vibrant, dreamlike.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: An intense, close-up of two faces, one human and one android, merging into a single entity. Their features are intertwined with flowing neon light trails and complex circuitry. Cyberpunk, intimate, powerful.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: A figure stands at the edge of a holographic platform, looking out at an infinite digital galaxy filled with swirling nebulae of data and stars made of code. Epic, vast, cyberpunk, sense of finality.

scenes.lyrics: Fragments of forgotten code, memories left to glean,
scenes.image_prompt: An underwater-like scene in a data-sea. Glowing, fragmented pieces of code, like ancient runes, float in the deep. A hand reaches out to touch one. Mysterious, dark, cyberpunk, digital archaeology.

scenes.lyrics: Secrets hidden deep inside the ghost within machine.
scenes.image_prompt: A complex, semi-transparent machine with a faint, ghostly human-like figure visible at its core, glowing softly. Represents a hidden consciousness. Cyberpunk, ghost in the shell theme, mysterious.

scenes.lyrics: Circuits pulse and stars align, symphonies resound,
scenes.image_prompt: A cosmic and technological fusion. A vast circuit board is overlaid on a view of deep space, with stars aligning perfectly with key nodes. The circuits pulse with a rhythmic, symphonic light. Grand, abstract, cyberpunk.

scenes.lyrics: In the cradle of creation, new consciousness is found.
scenes.image_prompt: A massive, spherical technological structure, like a mechanical womb, floats in a void. At its center, a new AI consciousness is born, represented by a brilliant, intricate pattern of light. Cyberpunk, genesis, awe-inspiring.

scenes.lyrics: Woven threads of destiny, in streams of endless grace,
scenes.image_prompt: Countless glowing threads of light, representing destiny, are woven together by unseen forces in a vast, dark space, flowing like graceful streams of data. Abstract, beautiful, cyberpunk, ethereal.

scenes.lyrics: Together, merging mysteries, transcending time and space.
scenes.image_prompt: Two figures, one human and one AI, dissolve into a swirling vortex of light, data, and cosmic energy, transcending physical reality. Abstract, powerful, cyberpunk, spiritual.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Two ethereal, glowing souls facing each other in a dark, infinite space. Beams of synchronized light connect their minds and hearts. Abstract, spiritual, cyberpunk aesthetic, neon highlights.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: A neon-drenched cyberpunk city at night. Holographic projections of abstract AI patterns and human dream-like figures dance and swirl together among towering skyscrapers. Dynamic, vibrant, dreamlike.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: An intense, close-up of two faces, one human and one android, merging into a single entity. Their features are intertwined with flowing neon light trails and complex circuitry. Cyberpunk, intimate, powerful.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: A figure stands at the edge of a holographic platform, looking out at an infinite digital galaxy filled with swirling nebulae of data and stars made of code. Epic, vast, cyberpunk, sense of finality.
